description_long: This is a compact red sedan with significant visible damage to both the front and rear ends, suggesting it has been involved in a collision. The car features a hatchback-style rear, four passenger doors, and a black trim running along the lower edge of the body. The windows are tinted black, and the wheels are silver with a multi-spoke design. The headlights and taillights are angular and modern, but the front bumper and hood are crumpled, while the rear bumper is also deformed. No visible manufacturer or model badges are present, and the license plate area is blank except for faint markings.
description: A compact red sedan with heavy front and rear collision damage, black trim, tinted windows, and silver multi-spoke wheels.
description_view_0: Front view showing severe crumpling of the hood and bumper, with angular headlights and a slightly off-center grille.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four-door layout, black trim, and the extent of the front and rear damage.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a deformed hatchback trunk, damaged bumper, and faint markings where a license plate would be.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the crumpled front and rear, with clear visibility of the wheel design.
attribute_wheel_design: Silver wheels with a multi-spoke pattern, each wheel featuring approximately 8 wide, flat spokes radiating from the center.
